name: Igarashi Gurimu
description:
💜--// Betrothed in the name of god.

Igarashi has a short and slim build. He has short hair, thick eyebrows, and wide-open eyes. His eyes are black in color. After he joins Blue Lock, he wears the standard-issued body suit and tracksuit. It is seen that he wears heart-printed trunks underneath his uniform while sleeping.
creator: Manuko_Aishi
